content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Turtles: Customer Happiness Advocate (Remote - Canad) Anywhere in the World 🇨🇦 Canada Minnesota Customer Support, Multitasking, Client Relationship Management, and Customer Service Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4081/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Finland <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.turtles.com/">https://www.turtles.com/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Customer Happiness Advocate (Remote - Canada, UK, Spain, Finland)</strong></p> <div class="MsoNormal"><hr width="828"></div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Job description</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal">Are you looking to join a high growth tech company? Are you passionate about people? Then we are looking for you!</p> <p class="MsoNormal">We are a small team with a big business! Our customers come first, and our Customer Support team is at the forefront!</p> <p class="MsoNormal">As a member of this team, you would be responsible for answering customer inquiries through email, chat, and phone.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">Successful applicants will begin with a two-week remote training period, following which the opportunity to work remotely is available. This is a 5 day per week position with shifts that may be from Mon-Sun and include evening work.</p> <p class="MsoNormal">We are looking for highly motivated people, who are capable of independent work and can meet set expectations within deadlines.</p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>We're looking to fill this role immediately, so please apply ASAP!</strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">Adhering to a daily schedule that includes a mix of taking phone calls, simultaneous chats, and responding to emails.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Engaging in human conversations with customers to identify and resolve issues, and provide help for them to succeed and have fun while shopping.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Ensuring customers receive the best Customer Service possible by responding to them in real time with the highest quality answer and experience possible. We live to go above and beyond for our customers.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Completing follow-up documentation after each customer ticket.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Offer needs-based solutions, not pushy sales.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">This is not a regular 9-5 job - We have 24/7 Customer Support so we are seeking night owls and weekend warriors alike!</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Owning your own development through reflection, reviewing past interactions and preparing to take initiative on opportunities.</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">In possession of a work permit from Canada, Finland, Spain, or the UK. Your application will not be considered if you do not meet this requirement.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Modern computer skills:&nbsp;Must be comfortable using and multitasking through: G-Suite, presentation software, communication tools (Slack and Zoom). Ability to learn new software is an asset.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Nice to have: experience with a CRM like Intercom/Zendesk, using text expander software, MMO gaming mouse (for productivity)</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Fluent professional English proficiency</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Type a minimum of 50 words per minute (Test yourself online if unsure!)</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Excellent written and spoken communication skills</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Willingness to help our customers and provide them with a personal experience</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Creative problem solver</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Ability to continuously develop and adapt to a growing team</li> <li class="MsoNormal">You hold yourself to high ethical standards</li> <li class="MsoNormal"><strong><em>Proofread your application!</em></strong></li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li class="MsoNormal">The starting salary for this role is 3875 CAD per month, plus extra pay for Sunday shifts.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">4 weeks of paid vacation per year.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Private health insurance.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Home office: we will provide any upgrades you need to your home office setup</li> <li class="MsoNormal">A Kindle with unlimited budget: any Business Book is yours to read!</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Team offsites: we get together as a full team every year, the last ones were in Malta and Las Vegas.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Pizza Fridays: at least every Friday the 13th (But usually more frequently!) we have Pizza Parties for both our Team at the Office and Remote! Delivered right to your door.</li> <li class="MsoNormal">Gifts: we believe in celebrating... it's part of our Work Hard / Play Hard Culture!</li> </ul> <p class="MsoNormal">&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/turtles-customer-happiness-advocate-remote-canad">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/turtles-customer-happiness-advocate-remote-canad</a></p> Tue, 23 Jun 2026 17:43:09 +0000 Thu, 23 Jul 2026 17:43:09 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/turtles-customer-happiness-advocate-remote-canad https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/turtles-customer-happiness-advocate-remote-canad Remote Talent Cloud: Remote AI Training - $20/hr - United States Anywhere in the World California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/1817/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cheyenne, WY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/">https://remotetalentcloud.com/</a> </p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6">==========</p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6"><strong>IMPORTANT! </strong>Please use this link to apply:<br><strong>➡️</strong>&nbsp;<a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/</a></p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6">==========</p> <p><strong>Description:</strong></p> <p class="wp-block-paragraph">As an <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">AI Training Specialist</a> (Data Annotation), you’ll play a key role in helping train and improve artificial intelligence (AI) systems. Your work will directly support how AI models learn to recognize text, images, and other data accurately.</p> <p class="wp-block-paragraph">Your main responsibilities will include:</p> <ul class="wp-block-list"> <li>Labeling and categorizing data (such as text, images, or short videos
